frontmatter.title: Memory Configuration
frontmatter.description: Configure session management and conversation memory

html:
Memory Configuration

LoongClaw provides persistent conversation memory with SQLite backend and sliding window management.

Basic Configuration

[memory]
backend = "sqlite"
sqlite_path = "~/.loongclaw/memory.sqlite3"
sliding_window = 12

Memory Options

Option Type Default Description
backend string "sqlite" Memory backend (currently: sqlite)
sqlite_path string ~/.loongclaw/memory.sqlite3 SQLite database path
sliding_window number 12 Number of turns to keep (1-128)
profile string "window_only" Memory profile
fail_open bool true Continue on memory errors
ingest_mode string "sync_minimal" Ingest mode

Memory Profiles

Profile Description
window_only Keep only the last N turns (sliding window)
window_plus_summary Window + periodic summaries
profile_plus_window Long-term profile + window

window_only

Default mode. Keeps only recent conversation:

[memory]
profile = "window_only"
sliding_window = 12  # Keep last 12 turns

window_plus_summary

Includes periodic summaries for longer context:

[memory]
profile = "window_plus_summary"
sliding_window = 12
summary_max_chars = 1200

profile_plus_window

Maintains a long-term profile alongside recent context:

[memory]
profile = "profile_plus_window"
sliding_window = 12
profile_note = "User preferences and context"

Session Management

Named Sessions

Use sessions to isolate conversations:

# Work session
loongclaw chat --session work

# Personal session
loongclaw chat --session personal

# Project-specific session
loongclaw chat --session my-project

Session Isolation

Each session has:

  • Independent conversation history
  • Separate memory context
  • Isolated tool execution state

Sliding Window

The sliding window controls how much context is retained:

[memory]
sliding_window = 12  # Keep last 12 turns

Choosing Window Size

Use Case Recommended Size
Quick Q&A 6-8
Code review 16-20
Long tasks 24-32
Extended sessions 48-64

Environment Override

# Override sliding window
LOONGCLAW_SLIDING_WINDOW=20 loongclaw chat

# Override SQLite path
LOONGCLAW_SQLITE_PATH=/custom/path/memory.db loongclaw chat

Conversation Configuration

Context Compaction

[conversation]
compact_enabled = true
compact_min_messages = 100
compact_trigger_estimated_tokens = 8000
compact_fail_open = true
Option Type Default Description
compact_enabled bool true Enable message compaction
compact_min_messages number - Minimum messages to trigger
compact_trigger_estimated_tokens number - Token threshold
compact_fail_open bool true Continue on compaction failure

Turn Loop Configuration

Control conversation flow:

[conversation.turn_loop]
max_rounds = 4
max_tool_steps_per_round = 1
max_repeated_tool_call_rounds = 2
max_ping_pong_cycles = 2
max_same_tool_failure_rounds = 3
max_followup_tool_payload_chars = 8000
max_followup_tool_payload_chars_total = 20000
Option Default Description
max_rounds 4 Maximum conversation rounds
max_tool_steps_per_round 1 Maximum tool calls per round
max_repeated_tool_call_rounds 2 Max rounds for repeated tool calls
max_ping_pong_cycles 2 Max ping-pong cycles
max_same_tool_failure_rounds 3 Max failures for same tool

Database Management

Check Database Size

du -h ~/.loongclaw/memory.sqlite3

Clean Old Sessions

# Remove old sessions
sqlite3 ~/.loongclaw/memory.sqlite3 "
  DELETE FROM conversations
  WHERE session_id NOT IN ('work', 'personal');
"

Compact Database

# Vacuum database to reclaim space
sqlite3 ~/.loongclaw/memory.sqlite3 "VACUUM;"

Backup Database

# Create backup
cp ~/.loongclaw/memory.sqlite3 ~/.loongclaw/memory.backup.sqlite3

# Or use SQLite backup
sqlite3 ~/.loongclaw/memory.sqlite3 ".backup ~/.loongclaw/memory.backup.sqlite3"

Context Engines

List available context engines:

loongclaw list-context-engines --json

Override in configuration:

LOONGCLAW_CONTEXT_ENGINE=custom-engine loongclaw chat

Memory Systems

List available memory systems:

loongclaw list-memory-systems --json

Override in configuration:

LOONGCLAW_MEMORY_SYSTEM=custom-system loongclaw chat

Troubleshooting

Database Locked

error: database is locked

Solution:

# Find other processes
ps aux | grep loongclaw

# Remove lock files
rm ~/.loongclaw/memory.sqlite3-journal
rm ~/.loongclaw/memory.sqlite3-wal

Session History Lost

Check:

  1. SQLite path configuration
  2. Database file exists
  3. Session name is correct
# Verify database
ls -la ~/.loongclaw/memory.sqlite3

# Check sessions
sqlite3 ~/.loongclaw/memory.sqlite3 "SELECT DISTINCT session_id FROM conversations;"

Large Database

Optimize:

# Clean old data
sqlite3 ~/.loongclaw/memory.sqlite3 "
  DELETE FROM conversations
  WHERE timestamp < datetime('now', '-30 days');
"

# Reclaim space
sqlite3 ~/.loongclaw/memory.sqlite3 "VACUUM;"

Slow Performance

Reduce window size:

[memory]
sliding_window = 8

Enable async ingestion:

[memory]
ingest_mode = "async_background"
